message: 🌱 Add cert-manager: Allow `ingressClassName` to be set for HTTP01 solver ingress mission (#347)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,83 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cert-manager-4821-allow-ingressclassname-to-be-set-for-http01-solver-ingresses",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cert-manager: Allow `ingressClassName` to be set for HTTP01 solver ingresses.",
+    "description": "Allow `ingressClassName` to be set for HTTP01 solver ingresses.. This issue affects 71+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify cert-manager feature symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your cert-manager deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=cert-manager\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors related to: Allow `ingressClassName` to be set for HTTP01 solver ingresses."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Deployment configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cert-manager resources:\n```bash\nkubectl get deployment -A\nkubectl describe deployment <name> -n <namespace>\n```\n**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**\n\nI have multiple `IngressControllers` running in my cluster. Each of them is configured to only control ingresses with a given `Ingre"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Allow `ingressClassName` to be set for HTTP01 solver ingress",
+        "description": "### Pull Request Motivation\n\nIn order to support both the legacy annotation and the new ingressClassName of Ingress v1, a flag has been added to allow switching. This should allow users with clusters supporting only ingressClassName to use the latest version, while being fully backwards compatible w\n```yaml\nsolvers:\r\n    - http01:\r\n       ingress:\r\n         class: external-nginx\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade cert-manager to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade cert-manager:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade cert-manager jetstack/cert-manager --namespace cert-manager\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager\nhelm list -n cert-manager\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Allow `ingressClassName` to be set for HTTP01 solv is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cert-manager -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The root cause is: ### Pull Request Motivation\n\nIn order to support both the legacy annotation and the new ingressClassName of Ingress v1, a flag has been added to allow switching. This should allow users with clusters supporting only ingressClassName to use the latest version, while being fully backwards compatible with existing users that use clusters that do not support ingressClassName.\n\nCloses: #4821 \n\n### Kind. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "solvers:\r\n    - http01:\r\n       ingress:\r\n         class: external-nginx",
+        "solvers:\r\n    - http01:\r\n       ingress:\r\n         ingressClassName: external-nginx"
+      ]
+    }
+  },

+    },
